## Checklist

- [ ] `bash tests/detect_test.sh` is green (added/updated a case if `detect.sh` changed)
- [ ] `bash -n` passes on changed shell scripts
- [ ] `claude plugin validate . --strict` passes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Keeps the kit small — no breadth-for-breadth additions
